ab: mahica tu, ayza a demiad a ladayen ni saydan kita tayza i niyazu’ mizizaw tu kalas.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去部落訪問耆老。
en: A: Hello everyone, today I’m taking you to the tribe to interview the elders.

ab: hang i! mihanu Sakizaya kita tu kalas.
ch: B:好喔！我們要跟耆老說撒奇萊雅語。

ab: a makatukuh tu kita haw?
en: A: Are we almost there?

ab: a makatukuh tu.
en: B:Almost there.

ab: baki, tayni kami miazih tisuwan.
en: A: Grandpa, we’ve come to see you.

ab: yah matineng kamu mihanu Sakizaya! tatenga’ matineng tu!
ch: B:你們會說撒奇萊雅語啊！真是太棒了！
en: B:You speak Sakizaya! That’s fantastic!

ab: mahica tu, ayza a demiad a ladayen ni saydan kita mapulung tayza i paluma tu habay maluk.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去小米田工作。
en: A:Hello everyone, today I will take you to work in the millet field.

ab: hang i, saydan.
en: B: Yes, sir.

ab: katayni misiluc kita, amana katawal miala tu sadikec.
ch: A:大家過來排隊，記得帶好工具。
en: A: Come and line up, remember to bring your tools.

ab: hang i, saydan, maala tu niyam ku sadikec.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都拿好工具了。
en: B: Yes, sir, we’ve got our tools.

ab: makatukuh tu kita haw?
en: B: Are we there yet?

ab: caay henay katukuh, mabatad henay.
en: A: Not yet, it’s still far away.

ab: katayza kisu mibasbas.
en: A: You go watering.

ab: hang, akuway ku mibasbasay.
en: B: Okay, I’ll water it.

ab: katayza kisu miala tu sapibahbah tu ayam.
en: A: You go get the bird catcher.

ab: hang, akuway ku mibahbahay tu ayam.
en: B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: mahica tu, ayza a demiad a tayza kita i aidangan nu aadupan.
ch: A:大家好，我們今天要去動物園。
en: A: Hello everyone, we are going to the zoo today.

ab: kapah tu! a hicaen ita tayza?
ch: B:好棒喔！我們要怎麼去呢？
en: B:Awesome! How are we gonna get there?

ab: u basu ku kacawan nu mita tayza.
en: A: Let’s take the bus.

ab: kapahen ku nipisiluc, a micakay tu paya kita.
ch: A:大家排好隊，我們準備買票。
en: A: Everyone line up, we are ready to buy tickets.

ab: hang i.
en: B: Yes.

ab: nu ayawan sa u ayaman, nu zikuzan sa nu bauay, kakuniza han kita muazih.
ch: A:前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.

ab: saydan matalaw kaku tu bau.
en: B: I’m afraid of snakes.

ab: a hicanaca, kau isu ku miazihay tu ayam.
en: A: It doesn’t matter, then you go and watch the birds.

ab: nu zikuzan cacay a tatukian tayni masaupu kita.
ch: A:我們一個小時後回來集合。
en: A: We’ll be back in an hour.

ab: hang, kukay saydan.
en: B: Yes, thank you.

ab: u canan ku nikaazihan isu ayza.
en: A: What did you see today?

ab: yadah ku nikaazihan aku tu bau atu ayam.
ch: B:我看到了好多蛇，還有好多鳥。
en: B: I saw a lot of snakes and a lot of birds.

ab: kabili, a mumul tu kita.
en: A: Hurry up, we have to go.

ab: halhalen kaku, mangelu’ ku kuku’ aku.
en: B: Wait for me, my feet are tired.

ab: maladay kita tayza mingaduy kapah haw?
en: A: Shall we go swimming together?

ab: hang i! natu i!
en: B:Yes! Let’s go!

ab: katuud ku tademaw i tini mingaduy.
en: A: There are a lot of people swimming here.

ab: i labu ku nanum i tiza, i tini han kita mingaduy.
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water is deep there, so we just swim here.
